expectations.text: Report identifies a TCP zero-window event
expectations.evidence: predicate 'mentions_zero_window' returned True on 6585 chars of output
predicate 'mentions_retransmit' returned True on 6585 chars of output

expectations.text: Report cites specific frame numbers as evidence (at least 3)
expectations.evidence: predicate 'cites_frame_numbers' returned True on 6585 chars of output

expectations.text: Report includes at least one concrete tshark/display filter the reader could re-run
expectations.evidence: predicate 'cites_specific_filter' returned False on 6585 chars of output

expectations.text: Report proposes concrete mitigation or next steps (not just 'monitor')
expectations.evidence: predicate 'has_mitigation_or_next_steps' returned True on 6585 chars of output

expectations.text: Output has a headed structure with TL;DR or executive summary plus findings
expectations.evidence: predicate 'report_has_structure' returned True on 6585 chars of output
